features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.description: Pre-wired business logic so you can focus on your product

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Email/password, Google, GitHub OAuth — ready out of the box with session management

payment.title: Payments
payment.description: Stripe, PayPal, Alipay, WeChat Pay — checkout, subscriptions, and webhooks

rbac.title: RBAC
rbac.description: Roles, permissions, wildcard matching — full admin panel with user management

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: English and Chinese built-in, locale-aware routing, easy to add more languages

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that works for you
